tree.name: Deni Avdija
tree.tradeDescription: POR traded Brogdon, Bub Carrington (#14 pick), 2028 2nd (GSW own), 2029 1st (POR own), and 2030 2nd (POR own) to Washington for Avdija and a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Malcolm Brogdon
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: POR traded Jrue Holiday to Boston for Brogdon, Robert Williams III, 2024 1st (GSW own, became Bub Carrington #14), and 2029 1st (BOS own).

assetsGivenUp.name: Jrue Holiday
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: POR sent Lillard to MIL, Nurkic/K.Johnson/N.Little to PHX. POR received Holiday and 3 1st-rd picks from MIL, Ayton and Camara from PHX.

assetsGivenUp.name: Damian Lillard
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 6th overall by Portland in 2012, Weber State guard

assetsGivenUp.name: Bub Carrington
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 14th overall in 2024 with pick acquired from GSW via BOS in Holiday trade. Also known as Carlton Carrington.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jrue Holiday
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: POR sent Lillard to MIL, Nurkic/K.Johnson/N.Little to PHX. POR received Holiday and 3 1st-rd picks from MIL, Ayton and Camara from PHX.

assetsGivenUp.name: Damian Lillard
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 6th overall by Portland in 2012, Weber State guard

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick via GSW
assetsGivenUp.note: Golden State's own 2028 2nd round pick, acquired via Holiday trade
